name: Chip Englander
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 7/11
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
| | |
---
| | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28981070:27827961053:m:1:879035888:844B48B3D7ECE1E1EEEAB5BDB0BEE199:r)
---
| | �
---
**Saturday, July 11, 2015**

This week, Senator Paul and our campaign continued to build on our momentum as Rand completed a successful swing through Iowa and New Hampshire. He was met with enthusiastic crowds at each stop who were eager to join our campaign in helping to defeat the Obama-Clinton Washington Machine. While in the Granite State, Rand picked up the endorsements of 25 New Hampshire leaders and activists. The Washington Machine is becoming increasingly aware of our momentum, and this week _The Hill_ newspaper called Rand the Democratic National Committee's "Top Target." A study also confirmed that Rand is attacked more by Hillary Clinton's liberal allies than any other 2016 Republican Presidential candidate. Rand has continued to make the case that he is the strongest conservative candidate in the race by announcing he is going to take strong steps to try and stop the federal funding of sanctuary cities, and again stressing the importance of securing the border immediately.

As the enthusiasm for our campaign grows, we want our supporters all across the country to get involved. Please [click here](s.heyo.com/344a40) and take a moment to record an endorsement video and tell us why you are supporting Rand for President. The top submissions will be used in our next web ad. Also, if you currently write for a blog, please [sign up here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28981071:27827961053:m:1:879035888:844B48B3D7ECE1E1EEEAB5BDB0BEE199:r) to join our exclusive Bloggers for Rand coalition. More news and updates can be found below. Stay tuned for the next Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
�
�
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Op-Ed: Oppose the Washington Machine's Education Bill
I believe that education is the great equalizer, but too often our one-size-fits-all system leaves most kids behind. The Washington Machine should not dictate what happens in our local classrooms. It should be local municipalities, parents, teachers and administrators who make these decisions.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28981072:27827961053:m:1:879035888:844B48B3D7ECE1E1EEEAB5BDB0BEE199:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul Calls for an End to Sanctuary Cities, Says There Should be Populist "Revolution" Against Unsecured Border
Conservatives say we believe in the rule of law, and the beginning of the rule of law is enforcing the law. Since 1986, there was a promise we would enforce the law on border security. We've done squat.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28981073:27827961053:m:1:879035888:844B48B3D7ECE1E1EEEAB5BDB0BEE199:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul's Iowa Campaign Should Make the Rest of the GOP Field Nervous
Paul might not be riding the so-called circuit like many of his contemporaries seem content in doing, but make no mistake, he is running a formidable caucus campaign in Iowa.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28981074:27827961053:m:1:879035888:844B48B3D7ECE1E1EEEAB5BDB0BEE199:r)
---
�
| | �
---
�

name: Marco Rubio
subject: My week in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900796:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)
---
Peter, I wanted to share with you some highlights from my time in Iowa this week, home of the very first caucus in the presidential nominating process and a key early state. Everywhere we went, we were met with large, enthusiastic crowds. [Click here to read the full recap on MarcoRubio.com. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r) See [photos](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r) from the trip, watch [video ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)of local TV coverage and my [interview ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)with Fox News, my [Snapchat ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)stories, and [listen](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900797:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r) to my radio interview with WHO-AM in Des Moines. While you're at the site and getting caught up on the week's activity, check out these posts from the past week as well:
* [We Need A Holistic Overhaul Of Our Education System ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900798:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)
* [This Is How To Build The Most Innovation-Friendly Economy In The World ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900799:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)
* [No Ambassador To Cuba Until Freedom & Democracy Are Secured ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900800:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)

Trips like these wouldn't be possible without your support, so thank you! Sincerely, Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42900801:18027910295:m:1:1349778030:73DEF543A32714DE5FB5CCDF1D851499:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

For more information . | mailto:unsub-27837157488-echo3-C479C02CF785AC63FDE0B71F8A3632E6@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: Jasmin Harris, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: A signed shirt from Hillary - how cool!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Don't miss your shot! Friend -- When I was a kid, I loved seeing Hillary in her pantsuits on TV, showing me that women can do and be anything they dream.

Now I work for Hillary for America, and one unofficial part of my job was modeling our "everyday pantsuit tee" for our website. **[Today we're raffling off five of them signed by Hillary herself.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

How cool would it be to show your friends and family that you had a shirt that Hillary personally took the time to sign? Talk about a collector's item! Imagine it framed on your wall -- or you could give it to a little girl you love to show her that when she grows up, she could be president, too.

**This raffle closes tonight at midnight -- don 't miss your opportunity to win a limited-edition pantsuit tee from Hillary:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/pantsuit-tee-raffle/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Good luck!

Jasmin

Jasmin Harris
Hillary for America

| No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received on 7/12/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Five (5) Winners will receive one (1) "Everyday Pantsuit Tee" autographed by Hillary Clinton. Approximate retail value of Prize: $150. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
---
| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMwMjY5MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMDY5MzE2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
